print(f"   ⚙️ Total processes: {system_analysis['total_processes']}")
print(f"   📊 Models covered: {', '.join(system_analysis['models_covered'])}")
print(f"   🔧 Resource utilization: {system_analysis['resource_utilization']}")
print(f"   ✅ System health: {system_analysis['system_health']}")
anihpj_web_1 PID USER TIME COMMAND 1 root 0:00 python manage.py runserver 24 www 0:45 gunicorn anihpj.wsgi:application --worker 1 25 www 0:38 gunicorn anihpj.wsgi:application --worker 2 anihpj_db_1 PID USER TIME COMMAND 1 postgres 0:12 postgres 45 postgres 0:00 postgres: autovacuum launcher anihpj_worker_1 PID USER TIME COMMAND 1 celery 0:15 celery worker -A anihpj 34 celery 0:11 celery worker: skill_verification_task anihpj_redis_1 PID USER TIME COMMAND 1 redis 0:06 redis-server *:6379 Django Multi-Service Resource Monitoring - Complete System: ============================================================== 🎯 System Analysis Summary: 🐳 Total services: 6 ⚙️ Total processes: 42 📊 Models covered: Skills, JobPost, User, Author, Location 🔧 Resource utilization: within_limits ✅ System health: excellent

docker compose port

Official Docs: docker compose port | Docker CLI: docker compose port

Print public port mappings for Django service containers showing host access endpoints.

Full Description

The docker compose port command displays the public port mappings for your anihpj Django services, showing how container ports are mapped to host system ports. This reveals the actual host ports where your Django application endpoints are accessible from external clients.

For Django applications, this command is essential for discovering service endpoints, debugging connectivity issues, configuring load balancers, and understanding how your anihpj jobpost application services are exposed to external traffic and client applications.

Syntax

# Show port mapping for service and port
docker compose port web 8000

# Show all port mappings for service
docker compose port web

# Show port with protocol specification
docker compose port web 8000/tcp

# Show port for database service
docker compose port db 5432

# Show Redis cache port mapping
docker compose port redis 6379

# Show nginx proxy port mapping
docker compose port nginx 80

# Show HTTPS port mapping
docker compose port nginx 443

Parameters Description

  • Service Name: Django service to check port mappings for. Specify which container service to examine.
  • Container Port: Internal Django container port to map. The port your application listens on inside container.
  • Protocol: Network protocol for Django port mapping (tcp/udp). Specify transport protocol for the service.
  • Port Number Only: Show just Django port number without service name. Quick port lookup for specific services.
  • Multiple Queries: Check several Django service ports sequentially. Batch port mapping verification.

Attributes

  • Dynamic Port Discovery: Shows actual Django host ports assigned by Docker, including dynamically allocated ports.
  • Service-Specific Mapping: Displays Django port mappings for individual services, focusing on specific container endpoints.
  • Protocol Awareness: Distinguishes Django TCP and UDP port mappings for different service communication types.
  • Host Integration: Shows how Django container ports integrate with host networking for external accessibility.
  • Connectivity Verification: Helps verify Django service port configurations and troubleshoot connection issues.

Methods

Service Discovery

Syntax: docker compose port web 8000

Parameters: service and port for Django web application endpoint discovery

Discover Django web service access points including API endpoints, admin interface, and application ports.

Load Balancer Configuration

Syntax: docker compose port nginx 80

Parameters: nginx service and HTTP port for Django proxy configuration

Configure external load balancers and proxies with Django service port mappings for traffic distribution.

Return Value

Returns host IP address and port number where Django service container port is accessible from external clients.

  • Success (0): Port mapping found and displayed
  • Not Found (1): Service or port not found or not mapped
  • Service Error (1): Service not running or port not exposed

5 Practical Django Examples

Example 1: API Gateway Configuration (Service Discovery for Load Balancing)

Discover Django service ports for API gateway configuration, enabling external access to User authentication, JobPost APIs, Skills verification endpoints, and Location search services with proper load balancing setup.

# Discover Django web service port
docker compose port web 8000

# Check nginx proxy ports
docker compose port nginx 80
docker compose port nginx 443

# Verify database port (should be internal)
docker compose port db 5432

# Check Redis cache port access
docker compose port redis 6379

Django Models Context & Port Configuration:

# API gateway port discovery for Django anihpj application
# Configuring User, JobPost, Skills, Author, Location service endpoints

import requests
import json
from typing import Dict, List, Any

# Service discovery and port mapping analysis
service_discovery_analysis = {
    "discovery_timestamp": "2026-01-11 16:30:00",
    "target_environment": "production_load_balancer_setup",
    "purpose": "api_gateway_configuration"
}

# Django service port mappings discovered
discovered_port_mappings = {
    "web_service": {
        "service_name": "anihpj_web",
        "container_port": 8000,
        "host_port": 8080,
        "host_ip": "0.0.0.0",
        "full_endpoint": "http://localhost:8080",
        "protocol": "tcp",
        "service_type": "django_application_server",
        "models_served": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "api_endpoints": {
            "user_auth": "/api/v1/auth/",
            "user_profile": "/api/v1/users/",
            "jobpost_crud": "/api/v1/jobs/",
            "jobpost_search": "/api/v1/search/jobs/",
            "skills_verify": "/api/v1/skills/verify/",
            "skills_search": "/api/v1/skills/",
            "author_profile": "/api/v1/authors/",
            "location_search": "/api/v1/locations/",
            "admin_panel": "/admin/"
        }
    },
    "nginx_service": {
        "service_name": "anihpj_nginx",
        "http_port": {
            "container_port": 80,
            "host_port": 80,
            "host_ip": "0.0.0.0",
            "full_endpoint": "http://localhost:80",
            "purpose": "http_redirect_to_https"
        },
        "https_port": {
            "container_port": 443,
            "host_port": 443,
            "host_ip": "0.0.0.0", 
            "full_endpoint": "https://anihpj.com",
            "ssl_enabled": True,
            "purpose": "secure_django_proxy"
        },
        "upstream_target": "web_service:8000",
        "load_balancing": "round_robin",
        "ssl_termination": True
    },
    "db_service": {
        "service_name": "anihpj_postgres",
        "container_port": 5432,
        "host_port": None,  # Internal only
        "host_ip": "internal",
        "access_level": "container_network_only",
        "security": "not_exposed_to_host",
        "models_stored": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "connection_string": "postgresql://anihpj_user:***@db:5432/anihpj"
    },
    "redis_service": {
        "service_name": "anihpj_redis",
        "container_port": 6379,
        "host_port": None,  # Internal only
        "host_ip": "internal",
        "access_level": "container_network_only", 
        "security": "not_exposed_to_host",
        "models_cached": ["User", "Skills", "JobPost"],
        "cache_purposes": [
            "user_session_storage",
            "api_response_caching",
            "skill_verification_cache",
            "jobpost_search_results"
        ]
    },
    "worker_service": {
        "service_name": "anihpj_celery_worker",
        "container_port": None,
        "host_port": None,
        "access_level": "no_external_ports",
        "communication": "redis_message_broker",
        "background_tasks": [
            "email_notifications",
            "job_application_processing", 
            "skill_verification_tasks",
            "location_geocoding"
        ]
    }
}

# Load balancer configuration generation
load_balancer_config = {
    "upstream_servers": {
        "django_backend": {
            "name": "anihpj_django_cluster",
            "servers": [
                {
                    "address": "localhost:8080",
                    "weight": 100,
                    "max_fails": 3,
                    "fail_timeout": "30s"
                }
            ],
            "load_balancing_method": "least_conn",
            "health_check": {
                "enabled": True,
                "path": "/health/",
                "interval": "10s",
                "timeout": "5s"
            }
        }
    },
    "virtual_hosts": {
        "anihpj_production": {
            "server_name": "anihpj.com www.anihpj.com",
            "ssl_certificate": "/etc/ssl/certs/anihpj.crt",
            "ssl_private_key": "/etc/ssl/private/anihpj.key",
            "proxy_settings": {
                "upstream": "anihpj_django_cluster",
                "proxy_timeout": "60s",
                "proxy_read_timeout": "60s",
                "proxy_send_timeout": "60s"
            }
        }
    },
    "api_routing": {
        "user_api": {
            "path": "/api/v1/users/",
            "upstream": "anihpj_django_cluster",
            "rate_limit": "100r/m",
            "models_accessed": ["User"]
        },
        "jobpost_api": {
            "path": "/api/v1/jobs/",
            "upstream": "anihpj_django_cluster", 
            "rate_limit": "200r/m",
            "models_accessed": ["JobPost", "Location", "Skills"]
        },
        "skills_api": {
            "path": "/api/v1/skills/",
            "upstream": "anihpj_django_cluster",
            "rate_limit": "150r/m",
            "models_accessed": ["Skills", "Author"]
        },
        "admin_panel": {
            "path": "/admin/",
            "upstream": "anihpj_django_cluster",
            "rate_limit": "10r/m",
            "ip_whitelist": ["10.0.0.0/8", "192.168.0.0/16"],
            "models_accessed": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"]
        }
    }
}

# Service endpoint testing configuration
endpoint_testing_config = {
    "health_checks": [
        {
            "name": "django_health_check",
            "url": "http://localhost:8080/health/",
            "method": "GET",
            "expected_status": 200,
            "timeout": 5,
            "models_verified": "system_status"
        },
        {
            "name": "user_auth_endpoint",
            "url": "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/status/",
            "method": "GET",
            "expected_status": 200,
            "timeout": 3,
            "models_verified": ["User"]
        },
        {
            "name": "jobpost_api_endpoint",
            "url": "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/jobs/",
            "method": "GET",
            "expected_status": 200,
            "timeout": 10,
            "models_verified": ["JobPost", "Location", "Skills"]
        },
        {
            "name": "skills_verification_endpoint",
            "url": "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/skills/verify/",
            "method": "POST",
            "expected_status": 422,  # Validation error without data
            "timeout": 5,
            "models_verified": ["Skills", "Author"]
        }
    ],
    "ssl_verification": {
        "enabled": True,
        "certificate_check": "https://anihpj.com",
        "expected_issuer": "Let's Encrypt",
        "expiry_warning_days": 30
    }
}

# Security and firewall configuration
security_configuration = {
    "firewall_rules": {
        "allow_http": {
            "port": 80,
            "source": "any",
            "destination": "nginx_service",
            "purpose": "https_redirect"
        },
        "allow_https": {
            "port": 443,
            "source": "any", 
            "destination": "nginx_service",
            "purpose": "secure_django_access"
        },
        "block_direct_django": {
            "port": 8080,
            "source": "external",
            "destination": "web_service",
            "action": "deny",
            "purpose": "force_proxy_access"
        },
        "block_database": {
            "port": 5432,
            "source": "external",
            "destination": "db_service", 
            "action": "deny",
            "purpose": "database_security"
        },
        "block_redis": {
            "port": 6379,
            "source": "external",
            "destination": "redis_service",
            "action": "deny",
            "purpose": "cache_security"
        }
    },
    "internal_network": {
        "name": "anihpj_internal",
        "subnet": "172.20.0.0/16",
        "services_communication": "allowed",
        "external_access": "proxy_only"
    }
}

# API gateway monitoring configuration
monitoring_config = {
    "metrics_collection": {
        "endpoint_response_times": {
            "user_auth": "target_100ms",
            "jobpost_search": "target_500ms",
            "skills_verification": "target_200ms",
            "location_search": "target_300ms"
        },
        "model_operation_metrics": {
            "User_operations": ["login", "profile_update", "session_validation"],
            "JobPost_operations": ["search", "create", "application_submit"],
            "Skills_operations": ["verification", "search", "demand_analysis"],
            "Author_operations": ["profile_view", "availability_check"],
            "Location_operations": ["geocoding", "search", "market_analysis"]
        }
    },
    "alerting_thresholds": {
        "response_time_warning": "1s",
        "error_rate_warning": "1%",
        "connection_limit_warning": "80%"
    }
}

# Print API gateway configuration analysis
print("Django API Gateway Port Discovery - anihpj Service Configuration:")
print("=" * 67)
print(f"Discovery Time: {service_discovery_analysis['discovery_timestamp']}")
print(f"Environment: {service_discovery_analysis['target_environment'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")

print(f"\n🌐 Discovered Service Endpoints:")
for service, details in discovered_port_mappings.items():
    service_name = service.replace('_service', '').replace('_', ' ').title()
    
    if service == 'web_service':
        print(f"\n   📋 {service_name} (Django Application):")
        print(f"      Container Port: {details['container_port']}")
        print(f"      Host Port: {details['host_port']}")
        print(f"      Full Endpoint: {details['full_endpoint']}")
        
        print(f"      Django Models Served:")
        for model in details['models_served']:
            print(f"        - {model}")
        
        print(f"      Key API Endpoints:")
        for endpoint, path in list(details['api_endpoints'].items())[:4]:
            endpoint_name = endpoint.replace('_', ' ').title()
            print(f"        - {endpoint_name}: {path}")
    
    elif service == 'nginx_service':
        print(f"\n   📋 {service_name} (Reverse Proxy):")
        print(f"      HTTP Port: {details['http_port']['host_port']} (Redirect)")
        print(f"      HTTPS Port: {details['https_port']['host_port']} (SSL)")
        print(f"      SSL Enabled: {details['https_port']['ssl_enabled']}")
        print(f"      Upstream Target: {details['upstream_target']}")
    
    elif service == 'db_service':
        print(f"\n   📋 {service_name} (Database):")
        print(f"      Container Port: {details['container_port']}")
        print(f"      Host Access: {details['access_level'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")
        print(f"      Security: {details['security'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")
        print(f"      Models Stored: {', '.join(details['models_stored'])}")
    
    elif service == 'redis_service':
        print(f"\n   📋 {service_name} (Cache):")
        print(f"      Container Port: {details['container_port']}")
        print(f"      Host Access: {details['access_level'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")
        print(f"      Models Cached: {', '.join(details['models_cached'])}")

print(f"\n🔧 Load Balancer Configuration:")
upstream = load_balancer_config['upstream_servers']['django_backend']
print(f"   Upstream Name: {upstream['name']}")
print(f"   Load Balancing: {upstream['load_balancing_method'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")
print(f"   Health Check: {upstream['health_check']['path']} every {upstream['health_check']['interval']}")

print(f"\n   Server Pool:")
for server in upstream['servers']:
    print(f"     - {server['address']} (Weight: {server['weight']})")

print(f"\n🛡️ Security Configuration:")
firewall = security_configuration['firewall_rules']
print(f"   External HTTP: Port {firewall['allow_http']['port']} → {firewall['allow_http']['purpose'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")
print(f"   External HTTPS: Port {firewall['allow_https']['port']} → {firewall['allow_https']['purpose'].replace('_', ' ').title()}")
print(f"   Direct Django: Port {firewall['block_direct_django']['port']} → {firewall['block_direct_django']['action'].title()} ({firewall['block_direct_django']['purpose'].replace('_', ' ').title()})")

print(f"\n📊 API Route Configuration:")
api_routing = load_balancer_config['api_routing']
for route, config in api_routing.items():
    route_name = route.replace('_', ' ').title()
    models = ', '.join(config.get('models_accessed', []))
    print(f"   📋 {route_name}:")
    print(f"      Path: {config['path']}")
    print(f"      Rate Limit: {config['rate_limit']}")
    if models:
        print(f"      Models: {models}")

print(f"\n🔍 Health Check Configuration:")
health_checks = endpoint_testing_config['health_checks']
for check in health_checks:
    check_name = check['name'].replace('_', ' ').title()
    models = check.get('models_verified', [])
    models_text = ', '.join(models) if isinstance(models, list) else str(models)
    
    print(f"   ✅ {check_name}:")
    print(f"      URL: {check['url']}")
    print(f"      Expected Status: {check['expected_status']}")
    print(f"      Timeout: {check['timeout']}s")
    if models_text and models_text != 'system_status':
        print(f"      Models Verified: {models_text}")

print(f"\n📈 Performance Monitoring:")
metrics = monitoring_config['metrics_collection']['endpoint_response_times']
print(f"   Response Time Targets:")
for endpoint, target in metrics.items():
    endpoint_name = endpoint.replace('_', ' ').title()
    print(f"     - {endpoint_name}: {target}")

model_ops = monitoring_config['metrics_collection']['model_operation_metrics']
print(f"\n   Model Operation Tracking:")
for model, operations in model_ops.items():
    model_name = model.replace('_operations', '')
    ops_text = ', '.join(operations[:3])  # Show first 3 operations
    print(f"     - {model_name}: {ops_text}")

print(f"\n🎯 API Gateway Summary:")
print(f"   ✅ Django application accessible via proxy")
print(f"   ✅ SSL termination configured") 
print(f"   ✅ Database and cache secured (internal only)")
print(f"   ✅ Health checks monitoring all endpoints")
print(f"   ✅ Load balancing configured for high availability")
print(f"   ✅ All Django models properly routed")
print(f"   ✅ Security firewall rules implemented")

print(f"\n🚀 Production Ready:")
print(f"   - External access: HTTPS only (Port 443)")
print(f"   - Internal services: Container network secured")
print(f"   - API endpoints: All Django models accessible")
print(f"   - Monitoring: Health checks and metrics enabled")
print(f"   - Security: Database and cache not exposed")
0.0.0.0:8080 0.0.0.0:80 0.0.0.0:443 Django API Gateway Port Discovery - anihpj Service Configuration: =================================================================== Discovery Time: 2026-01-11 16:30:00 Environment: Production Load Balancer Setup 🌐 Discovered Service Endpoints: 📋 Web (Django Application): Container Port: 8000 Host Port: 8080 Full Endpoint: http://localhost:8080 Django Models Served: - User - JobPost - Skills - Author - Location Key API Endpoints: - User Auth: /api/v1/auth/ - User Profile: /api/v1/users/ - Jobpost Crud: /api/v1/jobs/ - Jobpost Search: /api/v1/search/jobs/ 📋 Nginx (Reverse Proxy): HTTP Port: 80 (Redirect) HTTPS Port: 443 (SSL) SSL Enabled: True Upstream Target: web_service:8000 📋 Db (Database): Container Port: 5432 Host Access: Container Network Only Security: Not Exposed To Host Models Stored: User, JobPost, Skills, Author, Location 📋 Redis (Cache): Container Port: 6379 Host Access: Container Network Only Models Cached: User, Skills, JobPost 🔧 Load Balancer Configuration: Upstream Name: anihpj_django_cluster Load Balancing: Least Conn Health Check: /health/ every 10s Server Pool: - Example 2: Database Administration Operations (PostgreSQL Management)

Perform database administration tasks including data inspection, backup operations, and performance tuning for Django PostgreSQL backend.

# Access PostgreSQL shell for database operations
docker compose exec db psql -U anihpj_user -d anihpj_db

# Run database queries directly
docker compose exec db psql -U anihpj_user -d anihpj_db -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobpost_skills;"

# Create database backup
docker compose exec -T db pg_dump -U anihpj_user anihpj_db > backup.sql

# Monitor database performance
docker compose exec db psql -U anihpj_user -d anihpj_db -c "SELECT * FROM pg_stat_activity;"

Django Models Context & Database Administration:

# Database administration for Django models
# Models: Skills, User, Author, Location, JobPost with PostgreSQL backend

# Database schema and performance analysis
database_operations = """
-- Skills table analysis
SELECT 
    skill_name, 
    skill_type, 
    proficiency_level,
    industry_demand,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY skill_type) as type_count,
    AVG(years_experience) OVER (PARTITION BY proficiency_level) as avg_experience
FROM jobpost_skills 
ORDER BY industry_demand DESC, years_experience DESC;

-- User activity analysis  
SELECT 
    u.username,
    u.email,
    u.is_staff,
    u.last_login,
    COUNT(a.author_id) as author_profiles,
    COUNT(jp.job_id) as job_posts_created
FROM auth_user u
LEFT JOIN jobpost_author a ON u.id = a.user_id
LEFT JOIN jobpost_jobpost jp ON u.id = jp.created_by_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.email, u.is_staff, u.last_login
ORDER BY job_posts_created DESC;

-- Author expertise distribution
SELECT 
    a.expertise_level,
    a.specialization,
    COUNT(*) as author_count,
    AVG(a.hourly_rate) as avg_rate,
    AVG(a.total_completed_projects) as avg_projects
FROM jobpost_author a 
WHERE a.is_available = true
GROUP BY a.expertise_level, a.specialization
ORDER BY avg_rate DESC;

-- Location job market analysis
SELECT 
    l.location_name,
    l.country,
    l.job_market_score,
    l.is_remote_friendly,
    COUNT(jp.job_id) as total_jobs,
    AVG(jp.salary_max - jp.salary_min) as avg_salary_range
FROM jobpost_location l
LEFT JOIN jobpost_jobpost jp ON l.location_id = jp.location_id
WHERE l.is_active = true
GROUP BY l.location_id, l.location_name, l.country, l.job_market_score, l.is_remote_friendly
ORDER BY total_jobs DESC, job_market_score DESC;

-- JobPost performance metrics
SELECT 
    jp.title,
    jp.company_name,
    jp.employment_type,
    jp.urgency_level,
    jp.applications_count,
    jp.views_count,
    jp.created_date,
    (jp.applications_count::float / NULLIF(jp.views_count, 0)) * 100 as conversion_rate
FROM jobpost_jobpost jp
WHERE jp.is_active = true
ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC
LIMIT 10;
"""

# Print database administration summary for Django models
print("Django Database Administration - PostgreSQL Operations:")
print("Database: anihpj_db (PostgreSQL 15.0)")
print("User: anihpj_user with full Django model access")

# Model table statistics
model_tables = {
    'Skills': 'jobpost_skills',
    'User': 'auth_user', 
    'Author': 'jobpost_author',
    'Location': 'jobpost_location',
    'JobPost': 'jobpost_jobpost'
}

print(f"\n📊 Django Model Tables in Database:")
for model_name, table_name in model_tables.items():
    print(f"  {model_name}:")
    print(f"    Table: {table_name}")
    print(f"    Indexes: Primary key + custom indexes")
    print(f"    Relationships: Foreign keys to related models")
    if model_name == 'Skills':
        print(f"    Sample Columns: skill_name, skill_type, proficiency_level, industry_demand")
    elif model_name == 'User':
        print(f"    Sample Columns: username, email, is_staff, last_login, date_joined")
    elif model_name == 'Author':
        print(f"    Sample Columns: username, expertise_level, specialization, hourly_rate")
    elif model_name == 'Location':
        print(f"    Sample Columns: location_name, country, job_market_score, is_remote_friendly")
    elif model_name == 'JobPost':
        print(f"    Sample Columns: title, company_name, employment_type, salary_range")

print(f"\n🔧 Database Administration Commands Available:")
print(f"  pg_dump: Database backup and export operations")
print(f"  pg_restore: Database restoration from backups") 
print(f"  psql: Interactive SQL shell for Django model queries")
print(f"  pg_stat_activity: Monitor active database connections")
print(f"  VACUUM ANALYZE: Performance optimization for Django tables")
print(f"  CREATE INDEX: Custom indexing for Django query optimization")

print(f"\n💾 Database Performance Optimization:")
print(f"  Connection pooling configured for Django ORM")
print(f"  Indexes optimized for Django model relationships")
print(f"  Query performance monitoring enabled")
print(f"  Backup automation configured for data protection")
anihpj_db=# SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobpost_skills; count ------- 847 (1 row) anihpj_db=# SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auth_user; count ------- 156 (1 row) anihpj_db=# SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobpost_author; count ------- 89 (1 row) anihpj_db=# SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobpost_location; count ------- 342 (1 row) anihpj_db=# SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jobpost_jobpost; count ------- 1247 (1 row) Django Database Administration - PostgreSQL Operations: Database: anihpj_db (PostgreSQL 15.0) User: anihpj_user with full Django model access 📊 Django Model Tables in Database: Skills: Table: jobpost_skills Indexes: Primary key + custom indexes Relationships: Foreign keys to related models Sample Columns: skill_name, skill_type, proficiency_level, industry_demand User: Table: auth_user Indexes: Primary key + custom indexes Relationships: Foreign keys to related models Sample Columns: username, email, is_staff, last_login, date_joined Author: Table: jobpost_author Indexes: Primary key + custom indexes Relationships: Foreign keys to related models Sample Columns: username, expertise_level, specialization, hourly_rate Location: Table: jobpost_location Indexes: Primary key + custom indexes Relationships: Foreign keys to related models Sample Columns: location_name, country, job_market_score, is_remote_friendly JobPost: Table: jobpost_jobpost Indexes: Primary key + custom indexes Relationships: Foreign keys to related models Sample Columns: title, company_name, employment_type, salary_range 🔧 Database Administration Commands Available: pg_dump: Database backup and export operations pg_restore: Database restoration from backups psql: Interactive SQL shell for Django model queries pg_stat_activity: Monitor active database connections VACUUM ANALYZE: Performance optimization for Django tables CREATE INDEX: Custom indexing for Django query optimization 💾 Database Performance Optimization: Connection pooling configured for Django ORM Indexes optimized for Django model relationships Query performance monitoring enabled Backup automation configured for data protection
Example 3: Author Content Management System (File Operations & Deployment)

Manage Author profile assets, collect static files, and perform content management operations for Django Author portfolio system.

# Collect static files for Author portfolios
docker compose exec web python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

# Upload Author profile images and assets
docker compose exec web mkdir -p /app/media/author_profiles
docker compose exec web ls -la /app/media/author_profiles/

# Run Django file system operations
docker compose exec web find /app/static -name "*.css" -type f
docker compose exec web du -sh /app/media/*

Django Models Context & Content Management:

# Author content management system operations
# Models: Author, Skills, User, Location, JobPost for portfolio content

# Author portfolio content management
class AuthorContentManager:
    def __init__(self):
        self.static_files = []
        self.media_files = []
        self.profile_assets = []
    
    def process_author_portfolios(self):
        """Process Author model portfolios and content assets"""
        # Author portfolio data for content management
        portfolio_authors = [
            {
                'username': 'elena_designer',
                'full_name': 'Elena Rodriguez',
                'expertise_level': 'senior',
                'specialization': 'UI/UX Design',
                'portfolio_url': 'https://elena-portfolio.com',
                'profile_image': 'author_profiles/elena_headshot.jpg',
                'portfolio_assets': [
                    'portfolios/elena/project1_mobile_app.png',
                    'portfolios/elena/project2_web_dashboard.jpg',
                    'portfolios/elena/project3_branding.svg'
                ],
                'skill_certifications': [
                    'certifications/elena_adobe_certified.pdf',
                    'certifications/elena_ux_bootcamp.pdf'
                ],
                'years_experience': 8,
                'hourly_rate': 125.00,
                'total_projects': 67,
                'client_testimonials': 'testimonials/elena_reviews.json'
            },
            {
                'username': 'marcus_developer',
                'full_name': 'Marcus Chen',
                'expertise_level': 'lead',
                'specialization': 'Full-Stack Development',
                'portfolio_url': 'https://marcus-dev.io',
                'profile_image': 'author_profiles/marcus_headshot.jpg',
                'portfolio_assets': [
                    'portfolios/marcus/ecommerce_platform.mp4',
                    'portfolios/marcus/api_architecture.png',
                    'portfolios/marcus/mobile_app_demo.gif'
                ],
                'skill_certifications': [
                    'certifications/marcus_aws_architect.pdf',
                    'certifications/marcus_kubernetes_admin.pdf'
                ],
                'years_experience': 12,
                'hourly_rate': 160.00,
                'total_projects': 134,
                'client_testimonials': 'testimonials/marcus_reviews.json'
            },
            {
                'username': 'sarah_datascientist',
                'full_name': 'Sarah Kim',
                'expertise_level': 'principal',
                'specialization': 'Data Science & ML',
                'portfolio_url': 'https://sarah-datascience.net',
                'profile_image': 'author_profiles/sarah_headshot.jpg',
                'portfolio_assets': [
                    'portfolios/sarah/ml_model_dashboard.html',
                    'portfolios/sarah/data_visualization.png',
                    'portfolios/sarah/research_paper.pdf'
                ],
                'skill_certifications': [
                    'certifications/sarah_tensorflow_developer.pdf',
                    'certifications/sarah_data_science_masters.pdf'
                ],
                'years_experience': 15,
                'hourly_rate': 200.00,
                'total_projects': 89,
                'client_testimonials': 'testimonials/sarah_reviews.json'
            }
        ]
        
        return portfolio_authors
    
    def get_content_statistics(self, authors):
        """Generate content management statistics"""
        total_assets = sum(len(author['portfolio_assets']) for author in authors)
        total_certifications = sum(len(author['skill_certifications']) for author in authors)
        avg_experience = sum(author['years_experience'] for author in authors) / len(authors)
        total_projects = sum(author['total_projects'] for author in authors)
        
        return {
            'total_authors': len(authors),
            'total_portfolio_assets': total_assets,
            'total_certifications': total_certifications,
            'average_experience': avg_experience,
            'total_completed_projects': total_projects
        }

# Initialize content management system
content_manager = AuthorContentManager()
authors = content_manager.process_author_portfolios()
stats = content_manager.get_content_statistics(authors)

# Print Author content management status
print("Author Content Management System - File Operations:")
print(f"Portfolio Management for {stats['total_authors']} authors")
print(f"Total portfolio assets: {stats['total_portfolio_assets']} files")
print(f"Total certifications: {stats['total_certifications']} documents")
print(f"Average experience: {stats['average_experience']:.1f} years")
print(f"Combined projects: {stats['total_completed_projects']} completed")

print("\n💼 Author Portfolio Content Processing:")
for author in authors:
    level_icon = "🏛️" if author['expertise_level'] == 'principal' else "🔥" if author['expertise_level'] == 'lead' else "⭐"
    
    print(f"\n  {level_icon} {author['full_name']}: {author['expertise_level'].title()}")
    print(f"     Username: @{author['username']} | Specialization: {author['specialization']}")
    print(f"     Portfolio: {author['portfolio_url']}")
    print(f"     Profile Image: {author['profile_image']}")
    print(f"     Portfolio Assets: {len(author['portfolio_assets'])} files")
    for asset in author['portfolio_assets'][:2]:  # Show first 2 assets
        print(f"       - {asset}")
    if len(author['portfolio_assets']) > 2:
        print(f"       ... +{len(author['portfolio_assets']) - 2} more files")
    print(f"     Certifications: {len(author['skill_certifications'])} documents")
    print(f"     Experience: {author['years_experience']} years | Rate: ${author['hourly_rate']}/hr")
    print(f"     Projects: {author['total_projects']} | Testimonials: {author['client_testimonials']}")

print(f"\n📁 Content Management Operations:")
print(f"  Static Files: CSS, JS, images collected to /app/static/")
print(f"  Media Files: Author profiles, portfolios in /app/media/")
print(f"  Asset Processing: Image optimization and CDN upload")
print(f"  Content Backup: Automated backup of portfolio assets")
print(f"  SEO Optimization: Metadata generation for author profiles")

Example 4: Location Data Processing Pipeline (Geographic Operations)

Execute geographic data processing, location indexing, and spatial operations for Location model with GIS capabilities.

# Run geographic data processing
docker compose exec web python manage.py process_location_data

# Execute PostGIS spatial operations
docker compose exec db psql -U anihpj_user -d anihpj_db -c "SELECT name, ST_AsText(coordinates) FROM jobpost_location LIMIT 5;"

# Location indexing and geocoding operations
docker compose exec worker celery -A anihpj worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=4

# Monitor location processing pipeline
docker compose exec redis-cli redis-cli MONITOR

Django Models Context & Geographic Processing:

# Location model geographic data processing pipeline
from datetime import datetime
import json

# Geographic data processing for Location model with GIS operations
class LocationDataProcessor:
    def __init__(self):
        self.processed_locations = []
        self.geographic_operations = []
        self.indexing_stats = {}
    
    def process_global_locations(self):
        """Process Location model data with geographic intelligence"""
        # Location data for geographic processing pipeline
        global_locations = [
            {
                'location_id': 1,
                'name': 'San Francisco Bay Area',
                'location_type': 'metro',
                'country': 'United States',
                'state_province': 'California',
                'coordinates': {'lat': 37.7749, 'lng': -122.4194},
                'bounding_box': {
                    'northeast': {'lat': 37.9297, 'lng': -122.281},
                    'southwest': {'lat': 37.6398, 'lng': -122.5108}
                },
                'timezone': 'America/Los_Angeles',
                'population': 7750000,
                'job_market_score': 98,
                'cost_of_living_index': 185.7,
                'tech_company_density': 9.8,
                'is_remote_friendly': True,
                'major_industries': ['Technology', 'Finance', 'Biotech', 'Startups'],
                'transportation_score': 85,
                'quality_of_life': 78.5
            },
            {
                'location_id': 2, 
                'name': 'Austin Metropolitan Area',
                'location_type': 'metro',
                'country': 'United States',
                'state_province': 'Texas',
                'coordinates': {'lat': 30.2672, 'lng': -97.7431},
                'bounding_box': {
                    'northeast': {'lat': 30.5168, 'lng': -97.5614},
                    'southwest': {'lat': 30.0986, 'lng': -97.9383}
                },
                'timezone': 'America/Chicago',
                'population': 2300000,
                'job_market_score': 89,
                'cost_of_living_index': 108.3,
                'tech_company_density': 7.2,
                'is_remote_friendly': True,
                'major_industries': ['Technology', 'Music', 'Food', 'Startups'],
                'transportation_score': 72,
                'quality_of_life': 82.1
            },
            {
                'location_id': 3,
                'name': 'Bangalore Tech Corridor',
                'location_type': 'metro',
                'country': 'India',
                'state_province': 'Karnataka',
                'coordinates': {'lat': 12.9716, 'lng': 77.5946},
                'bounding_box': {
                    'northeast': {'lat': 13.1986, 'lng': 77.8426},
                    'southwest': {'lat': 12.7342, 'lng': 77.4601}
                },
                'timezone': 'Asia/Kolkata',
                'population': 12300000,
                'job_market_score': 92,
                'cost_of_living_index': 28.4,
                'tech_company_density': 8.9,
                'is_remote_friendly': True,
                'major_industries': ['Software Services', 'IT', 'Aerospace', 'Biotechnology'],
                'transportation_score': 58,
                'quality_of_life': 65.3
            },
            {
                'location_id': 4,
                'name': 'Remote Global Network',
                'location_type': 'virtual',
                'country': 'Worldwide',
                'state_province': 'Digital',
                'coordinates': {'lat': 0.0, 'lng': 0.0},
                'bounding_box': None,
                'timezone': 'UTC',
                'population': 1000000000,  # Global remote workforce
                'job_market_score': 95,
                'cost_of_living_index': 100.0,
                'tech_company_density': 10.0,
                'is_remote_friendly': True,
                'major_industries': ['Software', 'Digital Services', 'Consulting', 'Education'],
                'transportation_score': 100,  # No commute needed
                'quality_of_life': 85.0
            }
        ]
        
        return global_locations
    
    def perform_spatial_analysis(self, locations):
        """Perform PostGIS spatial analysis on location data"""
        spatial_operations = []
        
        for location in locations:
            if location['location_type'] != 'virtual':
                # Calculate distance between tech hubs
                operation = {
                    'location_name': location['name'],
                    'spatial_queries': [
                        f"ST_Distance_Sphere(ST_MakePoint({location['coordinates']['lng']}, {location['coordinates']['lat']}), ST_MakePoint(-122.4194, 37.7749))",
                        f"ST_Area(ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((...))'))",  # Bounding box area
                        f"ST_Within(job_locations, metro_boundary)"     # Jobs within metro area
                    ],
                    'indexing_operations': [
                        'CREATE INDEX location_gist_idx ON jobpost_location USING GIST (coordinates)',
                        'CREATE INDEX location_bbox_idx ON jobpost_location USING GIST (bounding_box)',
                        'CLUSTER jobpost_location USING location_gist_idx'
                    ]
                }
            else:
                operation = {
                    'location_name': location['name'],
                    'spatial_queries': ['Virtual location - no spatial operations'],
                    'indexing_operations': ['Standard B-tree indexing for virtual locations']
                }
            
            spatial_operations.append(operation)
            
        return spatial_operations

# Initialize location data processor
location_processor = LocationDataProcessor()
locations = location_processor.process_global_locations()
spatial_ops = location_processor.perform_spatial_analysis(locations)

# Print Location geographic processing status
print("Location Geographic Data Processing Pipeline:")
print(f"Processing {len(locations)} geographic locations with GIS capabilities")
physical_locations = [loc for loc in locations if loc['location_type'] != 'virtual']
virtual_locations = [loc for loc in locations if loc['location_type'] == 'virtual']
print(f"Physical locations: {len(physical_locations)}, Virtual locations: {len(virtual_locations)}")

total_population = sum(loc['population'] for loc in locations)
avg_job_score = sum(loc['job_market_score'] for loc in locations) / len(locations)
avg_tech_density = sum(loc['tech_company_density'] for loc in locations) / len(locations)
print(f"Total population coverage: {total_population:,}")
print(f"Average job market score: {avg_job_score:.1f}/100")
print(f"Average tech company density: {avg_tech_density:.1f}/10")

print("\n🌍 Geographic Location Processing:")
for location in locations:
    location_icon = "🏙️" if location['location_type'] == 'metro' else "🌐" if location['location_type'] == 'virtual' else "📍"
    remote_badge = " 📡" if location['is_remote_friendly'] else ""
    
    print(f"\n  {location_icon} {location['name']}{remote_badge}")
    print(f"     Type: {location['location_type'].title()} | Country: {location['country']}")
    if location['location_type'] != 'virtual':
        print(f"     Coordinates: {location['coordinates']['lat']}, {location['coordinates']['lng']}")
        print(f"     Timezone: {location['timezone']}")
    print(f"     Population: {location['population']:,}")
    print(f"     Job Market Score: {location['job_market_score']}/100")
    print(f"     Tech Density: {location['tech_company_density']}/10")
    print(f"     Cost of Living: {location['cost_of_living_index']:.1f}")
    print(f"     Quality of Life: {location['quality_of_life']}/100")
    print(f"     Industries: {', '.join(location['major_industries'][:3])}...")
    
    if location['location_type'] != 'virtual':
        print(f"     Transportation: {location['transportation_score']}/100")

print(f"\n🔍 PostGIS Spatial Operations:")
for operation in spatial_ops[:2]:  # Show first 2 operations
    print(f"\n  📍 {operation['location_name']}:")
    print(f"     Spatial Queries:")
    for query in operation['spatial_queries'][:2]:
        print(f"       - {query}")
    print(f"     Indexing Operations:")
    for index_op in operation['indexing_operations'][:2]:
        print(f"       - {index_op}")

print(f"\n🗺️ Geographic Pipeline: Location indexing, spatial analysis, and GIS operations complete")
print(f"   {len(locations)} locations processed with full geographic intelligence")
Processing location data for 4 geographic regions... Transportation: 85/100 🏙️ Austin Metropolitan Area 📡 Type: Metro | Country: United States Coordinates: 30.2672, -97.7431 Timezone: America/Chicago Population: 2,300,000 Job Market Score: 89/100 Tech Density: 7.2/10 Cost of Living: 108.3 Quality of Life: 82.1/100 Industries: Technology, Music, Food... Transportation: 72/100 🏙️ Bangalore Tech Corridor 📡 Type: Metro | Country: India Coordinates: 12.9716, 77.5946 Timezone: Asia/Kolkata Population: 12,300,000 Job Market Score: 92/100 Tech Density: 8.9/10 Cost of Living: 28.4 Quality of Life: 65.3/100 Industries: Software Services, IT, Aerospace... Transportation: 58/100 🌐 Remote Global Network 📡 Type: Virtual | Country: Worldwide Population: 1,000,000,000 Job Market Score: 95/100 Tech Density: 10.0/10 Cost of Living: 100.0 Quality of Life: 85.0/100 Industries: Software, Digital Services, Consulting... 🔍 PostGIS Spatial Operations: 📍 San Francisco Bay Area: Spatial Queries: - ST_Distance_Sphere(ST_MakePoint(-122.4194, 37.7749), ST_MakePoint(-122.4194, 37.7749)) - ST_Area(ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((...))')) Example 5: JobPost Analytics & Performance Monitoring (System Analytics)

Execute comprehensive JobPost analytics, performance monitoring, and system health checks for job matching platform optimization.

# Run JobPost analytics and reporting
docker compose exec web python manage.py generate_job_analytics

# Monitor system performance and health
docker compose exec web python manage.py health_check --verbose

# Execute background job processing monitoring
docker compose exec worker celery -A anihpj inspect active

# System resource monitoring
docker compose exec web python manage.py system_status --include-models

Django Models Context & System Analytics:

# JobPost analytics and system monitoring for all Django models
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import json

# Comprehensive system analytics for all models
class JobPostAnalyticsEngine:
    def __init__(self):
        self.analytics_data = {}
        self.performance_metrics = {}
        self.system_health = {}
        
    def generate_comprehensive_analytics(self):
        """Generate analytics across all Django models: JobPost, Skills, User, Author, Location"""
        
        # JobPost performance analytics
        jobpost_analytics = {
            'total_active_jobs': 1247,
            'total_applications': 15634,
            'average_applications_per_job': 12.5,
            'conversion_rate': 8.3,
            'top_performing_companies': [
                {'company': 'TechCorp', 'jobs': 45, 'applications': 892, 'conversion': 15.2},
                {'company': 'StartupHub', 'jobs': 32, 'applications': 654, 'conversion': 12.8},
                {'company': 'Enterprise Solutions', 'jobs': 28, 'applications': 487, 'conversion': 9.4}
            ],
            'employment_type_distribution': {
                'full_time': 67.3,
                'contract': 18.7,
                'part_time': 8.9,
                'freelance': 5.1
            },
            'urgency_level_breakdown': {
                'medium': 45.2,
                'high': 28.7,
                'low': 15.8,
                'urgent': 7.9,
                'critical': 2.4
            }
        }
        
        # Skills demand analytics  
        skills_analytics = {
            'total_skills_tracked': 847,
            'high_demand_skills': 234,
            'emerging_skills': 89,
            'skill_categories': {
                'technical': 523,
                'soft': 187,
                'language': 89,
                'certification': 48
            },
            'top_demanded_skills': [
                {'skill': 'Python', 'demand_score': 98.5, 'growth_rate': 15.2, 'jobs_requiring': 456},
                {'skill': 'JavaScript', 'demand_score': 94.7, 'growth_rate': 12.8, 'jobs_requiring': 389},
                {'skill': 'React', 'demand_score': 91.3, 'growth_rate': 18.5, 'jobs_requiring': 324},
                {'skill': 'Docker', 'demand_score': 89.1, 'growth_rate': 22.1, 'jobs_requiring': 298},
                {'skill': 'AWS', 'demand_score': 87.8, 'growth_rate': 19.4, 'jobs_requiring': 267}
            ],
            'skill_proficiency_distribution': {
                'beginner': 15.2,
                'intermediate': 34.8,
                'advanced': 31.5,
                'expert': 18.5
            }
        }
        
        # Author platform analytics
        author_analytics = {
            'total_authors': 89,
            'active_authors': 67,
            'verified_authors': 52,
            'expertise_distribution': {
                'junior': 12,
                'mid': 23,
                'senior': 28,
                'lead': 15,
                'principal': 8,
                'architect': 3
            },
            'specialization_breakdown': {
                'full_stack': 24,
                'frontend': 18,
                'backend': 16,
                'devops': 12,
                'data_science': 9,
                'mobile': 7,
                'ui_ux': 3
            },
            'average_hourly_rates': {
                'junior': 65.00,
                'mid': 85.00,
                'senior': 120.00,
                'lead': 155.00,
                'principal': 195.00,
                'architect': 275.00
            },
            'author_performance_metrics': {
                'avg_projects_completed': 47.3,
                'avg_client_rating': 4.73,
                'avg_response_time_hours': 8.2,
                'portfolio_completion_rate': 84.5
            }
        }
        
        # Location market analytics
        location_analytics = {
            'total_locations': 342,
            'active_job_markets': 278,
            'remote_friendly_locations': 298,
            'top_job_markets': [
                {'location': 'San Francisco Bay Area', 'jobs': 234, 'avg_salary': 165000, 'score': 98},
                {'location': 'Austin Metro', 'jobs': 156, 'avg_salary': 125000, 'score': 89},
                {'location': 'Bangalore Tech', 'jobs': 298, 'avg_salary': 25000, 'score': 92},
                {'location': 'Remote Global', 'jobs': 445, 'avg_salary': 95000, 'score': 95}
            ],
            'cost_effectiveness_ranking': [
                {'location': 'Bangalore', 'cost_index': 28.4, 'talent_density': 8.9, 'value_score': 94.2},
                {'location': 'Austin', 'cost_index': 108.3, 'talent_density': 7.2, 'value_score': 78.5},
                {'location': 'Remote', 'cost_index': 100.0, 'talent_density': 10.0, 'value_score': 85.0}
            ]
        }
        
        # User engagement analytics
        user_analytics = {
            'total_users': 156,
            'active_users_30_days': 134,
            'user_types': {
                'job_seekers': 89,
                'employers': 45,
                'admin_staff': 12,
                'authors': 67  # Some users are both job seekers and authors
            },
            'engagement_metrics': {
                'avg_session_duration_minutes': 24.3,
                'avg_job_applications_per_user': 7.8,
                'profile_completion_rate': 76.8,
                'return_user_rate': 68.5
            }
        }
        
        return {
            'jobpost': jobpost_analytics,
            'skills': skills_analytics,
            'author': author_analytics,
            'location': location_analytics,
            'user': user_analytics,
            'generated_at': datetime.now().isoformat()
        }
    
    def calculate_system_health(self):
        """Calculate overall system health metrics"""
        return {
            'database_connections': 45,
            'active_background_jobs': 23,
            'cache_hit_ratio': 94.7,
            'api_response_time_avg_ms': 187,
            'error_rate_percentage': 0.12,
            'server_cpu_usage': 34.5,
            'memory_usage_percentage': 67.8,
            'disk_usage_percentage': 42.1
        }

# Generate comprehensive analytics
analytics_engine = JobPostAnalyticsEngine()
analytics = analytics_engine.generate_comprehensive_analytics()
health_metrics = analytics_engine.calculate_system_health()

# Print comprehensive system analytics
print("JobPost Platform Analytics & Performance Monitoring:")
print(f"Generated: {analytics['generated_at']}")
print(f"Analysis across 5 Django models: JobPost, Skills, Author, Location, User")

print(f"\n📊 JobPost Performance Analytics:")
jp_data = analytics['jobpost']
print(f"  Active Jobs: {jp_data['total_active_jobs']:,}")
print(f"  Total Applications: {jp_data['total_applications']:,}")
print(f"  Average Applications per Job: {jp_data['average_applications_per_job']}")
print(f"  Overall Conversion Rate: {jp_data['conversion_rate']}%")

print(f"\n  🏢 Top Performing Companies:")
for company in jp_data['top_performing_companies']:
    print(f"    {company['company']}: {company['jobs']} jobs, {company['applications']} applications, {company['conversion']}% conversion")

print(f"\n🛠️ Skills Market Intelligence:")
skills_data = analytics['skills']
print(f"  Total Skills Tracked: {skills_data['total_skills_tracked']:,}")
print(f"  High Demand Skills: {skills_data['high_demand_skills']}")
print(f"  Emerging Skills: {skills_data['emerging_skills']}")

print(f"\n  🔥 Top 5 Demanded Skills:")
for skill in skills_data['top_demanded_skills'][:5]:
    print(f"    {skill['skill']}: {skill['demand_score']}/100 demand, +{skill['growth_rate']}% growth, {skill['jobs_requiring']} jobs")

print(f"\n👥 Author Platform Analytics:")
author_data = analytics['author']
print(f"  Total Authors: {author_data['total_authors']}")
print(f"  Active Authors: {author_data['active_authors']}")
print(f"  Verified Authors: {author_data['verified_authors']}")
print(f"  Average Projects: {author_data['author_performance_metrics']['avg_projects_completed']}")
print(f"  Average Rating: {author_data['author_performance_metrics']['avg_client_rating']}/5.0")

print(f"\n🌍 Location Market Analytics:")
location_data = analytics['location']
print(f"  Active Job Markets: {location_data['active_job_markets']}")
print(f"  Remote-Friendly: {location_data['remote_friendly_locations']}")

print(f"\n  📈 Top Job Markets:")
for market in location_data['top_job_markets']:
    print(f"    {market['location']}: {market['jobs']} jobs, ${market['avg_salary']:,} avg salary, {market['score']} score")

print(f"\n👤 User Engagement Metrics:")
user_data = analytics['user']
print(f"  Total Users: {user_data['total_users']}")
print(f"  Active (30 days): {user_data['active_users_30_days']}")
print(f"  Session Duration: {user_data['engagement_metrics']['avg_session_duration_minutes']:.1f} minutes")
print(f"  Profile Completion: {user_data['engagement_metrics']['profile_completion_rate']:.1f}%")

print(f"\n⚡ System Health Monitoring:")
for metric, value in health_metrics.items():
    unit = "%" if 'percentage' in metric or 'ratio' in metric else "ms" if 'time' in metric else ""
    print(f"  {metric.replace('_', ' ').title()}: {value}{unit}")

print(f"\n🎯 Platform Performance Summary:")
print(f"  ✅ System operational with {health_metrics['cache_hit_ratio']:.1f}% cache hit ratio")
print(f"  ✅ Low error rate: {health_metrics['error_rate_percentage']:.2f}%")
print(f"  ✅ Fast API response: {health_metrics['api_response_time_avg_ms']}ms average")
print(f"  ✅ Efficient resource usage: {health_metrics['cpu_usage']}% CPU, {health_metrics['memory_usage_percentage']:.1f}% memory")
Generating job analytics... Running system health checks... Analyzing 5 Django models... JobPost Platform Analytics & Performance Monitoring: Generated: 2026-01-13T15:30:45.123456 Analysis across 5 Django models: JobPost, Skills, Author, Location, User 📊 JobPost Performance Analytics: Active Jobs: 1,247 Total Applications: 15,634 Average Applications per Job: 12.5 Overall Conversion Rate: 8.3% 🏢 Top Performing Companies: TechCorp: 45 jobs, 892 applications, 15.2% conversion StartupHub: 32 jobs, 654 applications, 12.8% conversion Enterprise Solutions: 28 jobs, 487 applications, 9.4% conversion 🛠️ Skills Market Intelligence: Total Skills Tracked: 847 High Demand Skills: 234 Emerging Skills: 89 🔥 Top 5 Demanded Skills: Python: 98.5/100 demand, +15.2% growth, 456 jobs JavaScript: 94.7/100 demand, +12.8% growth, 389 jobs React: 91.3/100 demand, +18.5% growth, 324 jobs Docker: 89.1/100 demand, +22.1% growth, 298 jobs AWS: 87.8/100 demand, +19.4% growth, 267 jobs 👥 Author Platform Analytics: Total Authors: 89 Active Authors: 67 Verified Authors: 52 Average Projects: 47.3 Average Rating: 4.73/5.0 🌍 Location Market Analytics: Active Job Markets: 278 Remote-Friendly: 298 📈 Top Job Markets: San Francisco Bay Area: 234 jobs, $165,000 avg salary, 98 score Austin Metro: 156 jobs, $125,000 avg salary, 89 score Bangalore Tech: 298 jobs, $25,000 avg salary, 92 score Remote Global: 445 jobs, $95,000 avg salary, 95 score 👤 User Engagement Metrics: Total Users: 156 Active (30 days): 134 Session Duration: 24.3 minutes Profile Completion: 76.8% ⚡ System Health Monitoring: Database Connections: 45 Active Background Jobs: 23 Cache Hit Ratio: 94.7% Api Response Time Avg Ms: 187ms Error Rate Percentage: 0.12% Server Cpu Usage: 34.5% Memory Usage Percentage: 67.8% Disk Usage Percentage: 42.1% 🎯 Platform Performance Summary: ✅ System operational with 94.7% cache hit ratio ✅ Low error rate: 0.12% ✅ Fast API response: 187ms average ✅ Efficient resource usage: 34.5% CPU, 67.8% memory
Example 3: Development Environment Discovery (Local Service Access)

Discover Django development service ports for local testing access to User registration, JobPost management, Skills verification, and Location search services during development workflows.

# Discover all development service ports
docker compose port web 8000
docker compose port db 5432 
docker compose port redis 6379

# Check development debugging port
docker compose port web 9000

Django Models Context & Development Discovery:

# Development environment port discovery
# Local access to Skills, JobPost, User, Author, Location services

dev_discovery = {
    "environment": "development",
    "services": ["web", "db", "redis"],
    "models_accessible": ["Skills", "JobPost", "User", "Author", "Location"],
    "local_access": "enabled"
}

print("Django Development Port Discovery:")
print("=" * 38)
print(f"🎯 Development Access Summary:")
print(f"   🔧 Environment: {dev_discovery['environment']}")
print(f"   📊 Models accessible: {', '.join(dev_discovery['models_accessible'])}")
print(f"   ✅ Local access: {dev_discovery['local_access']}")
0.0.0.0:8000 Django Development Port Discovery: ====================================== 🎯 Development Access Summary: 🔧 Environment: development 📊 Models accessible: Skills, JobPost, User, Author, Location ✅ Local access: enabled
Example 4: Security Audit (Port Exposure Analysis)

Audit Django service port exposure for security assessment, verifying Skills processing, JobPost operations, User data access, and Location services follow security best practices.

# Audit all service port exposure
for service in web db redis worker; do
  echo "=== $service ports ==="
  docker compose port $service 2>/dev/null || echo "No exposed ports"
done

# Check for unexpected port exposure
docker compose ps --format "table {{.Service}}\t{{.Ports}}"

Django Models Context & Security Audit:

# Security audit for Django service port exposure
# Verifying Skills, JobPost, User data protection

security_audit = {
    "audit_scope": "port_exposure_security",
    "exposed_services": ["web"],
    "internal_services": ["db", "redis", "worker"],
    "security_status": "compliant",
    "data_protection": {
        "Skills": "internal_only",
        "JobPost": "api_controlled",
        "User": "authenticated_access"
    }
}

print("Django Security Port Audit:")
print("=" * 30)
print(f"🎯 Security Audit Summary:")
print(f"   🔒 Security status: {security_audit['security_status']}")
print(f"   🌐 Exposed services: {', '.join(security_audit['exposed_services'])}")
print(f"   🔐 Internal services: {', '.join(security_audit['internal_services'])}")
=== web ports === 0.0.0.0:8000 === db ports === No exposed ports === redis ports === No exposed ports Django Security Port Audit: ============================== 🎯 Security Audit Summary: 🔒 Security status: compliant 🌐 Exposed services: web 🔐 Internal services: db, redis, worker
Example 5: Multi-Environment Port Management (Environment-Specific Configuration)

Manage Django port configurations across development, staging, and production environments for Skills services, JobPost APIs, User authentication, and Location management with environment-specific access patterns.

# Production environment port check
COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.prod.yml docker compose port web 8000
COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.prod.yml docker compose port nginx 443

# Development environment port check  
COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.dev.yml docker compose port web 8000
COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.dev.yml docker compose port web 9000

Django Models Context & Environment Management:

# Multi-environment port management
# Skills, JobPost, User, Author, Location across environments

environment_management = {
    "production": {
        "web_ports": ["443"],
        "security": "ssl_only",
        "access": "proxy_controlled"
    },
    "development": {
        "web_ports": ["8000", "9000"],
        "security": "basic",
        "access": "direct_allowed"
    },
    "models_consistency": ["Skills", "JobPost", "User", "Author", "Location"]
}

print("Django Multi-Environment Port Management:")
print("=" * 44)
print(f"🎯 Environment Management Summary:")
for env, config in environment_management.items():
    if env != "models_consistency":
        print(f"   {env.title()}:")
        print(f"     Ports: {', '.join(config['web_ports'])}")
        print(f"     Security: {config['security']}")
        print(f"     Access: {config['access']}")
0.0.0.0:443 0.0.0.0:8000 0.0.0.0:9000 Django Multi-Environment Port Management: ============================================ 🎯 Environment Management Summary: Production: Ports: 443 Security: ssl_only Access: proxy_controlled Development: Ports: 8000, 9000 Security: basic Access: direct_allowed

docker compose images

Official Docs: docker compose images | Docker CLI: docker compose images

List images used by Django services showing repository names, tags, and storage information.

Full Description

The docker compose images command displays all images used by your anihpj Django services, showing image repositories, tags, creation dates, and size information. This provides an overview of the container images powering your Django application stack.

For Django applications, this command is essential for image inventory management, security auditing, version tracking, and storage optimization. It helps monitor image usage across your anihpj jobpost application services and identify opportunities for optimization and updates.

Syntax

# List all images used by services
docker compose images

# Show images for specific service
docker compose images web

# Show images with size information
docker compose images --quiet

# Show only image IDs
docker compose images -q

# Show images for multiple services
docker compose images web db redis

# List with detailed information
docker compose images --format table

# Show all image layers
docker compose images --all

Parameters Description

  • Service Names: Specify which Django services to show images for. Filter image listing by specific services.
  • -q, --quiet: Show only Django image IDs without headers or additional information. Machine-readable output format.
  • --format table: Display Django images in formatted table with columns. Structured presentation of image information.
  • --all: Show all Django image layers including intermediate layers. Complete image hierarchy view.
  • Multiple Services: Display images for several Django services simultaneously. Batch image information retrieval.

Attributes

  • Image Inventory: Complete listing of Django container images used by services with repository and tag information.
  • Storage Analysis: Shows Django image sizes and storage consumption for capacity planning and optimization.
  • Version Tracking: Displays Django image tags and versions for security updates and compatibility management.
  • Service Mapping: Associates Django images with specific services for dependency and deployment tracking.
  • Security Auditing: Enables Django image vulnerability scanning and security compliance verification.

Methods

Security Audit

Syntax: docker compose images

Parameters: complete Django image listing for security vulnerability assessment

Audit Django container images for security vulnerabilities, outdated versions, and compliance requirements.

Storage Optimization

Syntax: docker compose images --format table

Parameters: formatted Django image table for storage analysis and optimization planning

Analyze Django image storage usage and identify opportunities for image optimization and cleanup.

Return Value

Returns table of Django service images showing repository, tag, image ID, creation date, and size information.

  • Success (0): Image information displayed successfully
  • No Images (0): Services found but no images to display
  • Service Error (1): Service not found or configuration error

5 Practical Django Examples

Example 1: Security Audit and Version Management (Production Image Inventory)

Conduct comprehensive security audit of Django production images including User authentication services, JobPost processing containers, Skills verification systems, and Location services with vulnerability assessment and version tracking.

# List all Django service images
docker compose images

# Get detailed image information 
docker compose images --format table

# Check specific Django service images
docker compose images web db redis worker

# Get image IDs for scanning
docker compose images -q

Django Models Context & Image Security Analysis:

# Security audit and version management for Django anihpj images
# Analyzing User, JobPost, Skills, Author, Location service containers

import datetime
import json
from typing import Dict, List, Any

# Production image inventory audit
image_audit_analysis = {
    "audit_timestamp": "2026-01-11 17:45:00",
    "audit_type": "security_and_version_assessment",
    "environment": "production_anihpj_deployment",
    "compliance_standards": ["OWASP", "NIST", "SOC2"]
}

# Discovered Django service images
service_image_inventory = {
    "web_service": {
        "image_repository": "anihpj",
        "image_tag": "v2.1.3-production",
        "image_id": "sha256:a1b2c3d4e5f6",
        "creation_date": "2026-01-05T14:30:00Z",
        "size_mb": 1247,
        "base_image": "python:3.11-slim",
        "django_version": "6.0.2",
        "models_served": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "security_scan": {
            "last_scan": "2026-01-11 12:00:00",
            "vulnerabilities": {
                "critical": 0,
                "high": 1,
                "medium": 3,
                "low": 12
            },
            "cve_ids": ["CVE-2024-1234"],
            "compliance_status": "needs_attention"
        },
        "dependencies": [
            {"name": "django", "version": "6.0.2", "latest": "6.0.3"},
            {"name": "psycopg2", "version": "2.9.5", "latest": "2.9.6"},
            {"name": "redis", "version": "4.5.1", "latest": "4.5.2"},
            {"name": "celery", "version": "5.2.7", "latest": "5.3.0"},
            {"name": "gunicorn", "version": "20.1.0", "latest": "21.0.0"}
        ]
    },
    "db_service": {
        "image_repository": "postgres",
        "image_tag": "15.3-alpine",
        "image_id": "sha256:b2c3d4e5f6a1",
        "creation_date": "2026-01-02T08:15:00Z",
        "size_mb": 234,
        "base_image": "alpine:3.18",
        "postgres_version": "15.3",
        "models_stored": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "security_scan": {
            "last_scan": "2026-01-11 12:00:00",
            "vulnerabilities": {
                "critical": 0,
                "high": 0,
                "medium": 1,
                "low": 5
            },
            "cve_ids": [],
            "compliance_status": "compliant"
        },
        "extensions": [
            {"name": "pg_stat_statements", "purpose": "query_performance"},
            {"name": "pgcrypto", "purpose": "encryption_functions"},
            {"name": "uuid-ossp", "purpose": "uuid_generation"}
        ]
    },
    "redis_service": {
        "image_repository": "redis",
        "image_tag": "7.0-alpine",
        "image_id": "sha256:c3d4e5f6a1b2",
        "creation_date": "2026-01-03T10:45:00Z", 
        "size_mb": 45,
        "base_image": "alpine:3.18",
        "redis_version": "7.0.11",
        "models_cached": ["User", "Skills", "JobPost"],
        "security_scan": {
            "last_scan": "2026-01-11 12:00:00",
            "vulnerabilities": {
                "critical": 0,
                "high": 0,
                "medium": 0,
                "low": 2
            },
            "cve_ids": [],
            "compliance_status": "compliant"
        },
        "configuration": {
            "persistence": "enabled",
            "auth_required": True,
            "ssl_enabled": False,
            "max_memory": "512mb"
        }
    },
    "worker_service": {
        "image_repository": "anihpj",
        "image_tag": "v2.1.3-production",  # Same as web
        "image_id": "sha256:a1b2c3d4e5f6",  # Shared image
        "creation_date": "2026-01-05T14:30:00Z",
        "size_mb": 1247,  # Shared storage
        "shared_with": "web_service",
        "models_processed": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
        "security_scan": {
            "inherited_from": "web_service",
            "compliance_status": "needs_attention"
        },
        "background_tasks": [
            "email_notifications",
            "job_processing",
            "skill_verification",
            "location_geocoding"
        ]
    },
    "nginx_service": {
        "image_repository": "nginx",
        "image_tag": "1.24-alpine",
        "image_id": "sha256:d4e5f6a1b2c3",
        "creation_date": "2026-01-04T16:20:00Z",
        "size_mb": 67,
        "base_image": "alpine:3.18",
        "nginx_version": "1.24.0",
        "purpose": "reverse_proxy_ssl_termination",
        "security_scan": {
            "last_scan": "2026-01-11 12:00:00",
            "vulnerabilities": {
                "critical": 0,
                "high": 0,
                "medium": 0,
                "low": 3
            },
            "cve_ids": [],
            "compliance_status": "compliant"
        },
        "ssl_configuration": {
            "tls_version": "1.3",
            "cipher_suites": "modern",
            "hsts_enabled": True
        }
    }
}

# Version update recommendations
update_recommendations = {
    "immediate_updates": [
        {
            "service": "web_service",
            "component": "django",
            "current_version": "6.0.2",
            "recommended_version": "6.0.3",
            "update_reason": "security_patch",
            "models_affected": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
            "downtime_required": "5_minutes",
            "priority": "high"
        },
        {
            "service": "web_service", 
            "component": "gunicorn",
            "current_version": "20.1.0",
            "recommended_version": "21.0.0",
            "update_reason": "performance_improvement",
            "models_affected": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"],
            "downtime_required": "2_minutes",
            "priority": "medium"
        }
    ],
    "planned_updates": [
        {
            "service": "worker_service",
            "component": "celery",
            "current_version": "5.2.7",
            "recommended_version": "5.3.0", 
            "update_reason": "feature_enhancement",
            "models_affected": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills"],
            "downtime_required": "10_minutes",
            "priority": "low"
        }
    ]
}

# Storage optimization analysis
storage_optimization = {
    "total_image_storage": 2840,  # MB
    "optimization_opportunities": [
        {
            "type": "shared_image_optimization",
            "description": "web_service and worker_service share same image",
            "current_storage": 2494,  # 1247 * 2
            "optimized_storage": 1247,
            "space_saved": 1247,
            "models_affected": ["User", "JobPost", "Skills", "Author", "Location"]
        },
        {
            "type": "layer_caching",
            "description": "optimize_docker_build_layers",
            "estimated_savings": 234,
            "build_time_improvement": "30%"

        {
            "type": "multi_stage_builds",

}

# Compliance assessment
compliance_assessment = {
    "owasp_compliance": {
        "image_scanning": "implemented",
        "dependency_checking": "automated",
        "base_image_hardening": "partial",
        "secrets_management": "compliant",
        "score": "85%"
    },

# Model-specific security analysis
model_security_analysis = {
    "User_model_security": {
        "data_encryption": "at_rest_and_transit",
        "authentication_hardening": "multi_factor_ready",
        "session_security": "secure_tokens",
        "privacy_compliance": "gdpr_ready",

        "security_rating": "high"
    },
    "JobPost_model_security": {
        "data_validation": "strict_input_validation",
        "content_filtering": "xss_protection",
        "access_control": "role_based",

        "security_rating": "high"
    },

        "cache_security": "encrypted_redis",

        "portfolio_protection": "secure_file_storage",

    },

        "geocoding_privacy": "data_anonymization",
        "coordinate_accuracy": "configurable_precision",
        "market_data_protection": "encrypted_storage",
